item.title: Transgirl Tuesday 28th ed.
item.description:
EmmaTS is NOT trans, as was pointed out by oldpotatoes, and that’s really shit of her to pretend
Cienna Rosalina
KenzieFanta
Sophie before transition
YurTgurlSophie
Angelica Ross
Robin Rose
Yasmin Finney
Eva Everett Irving - I HAD to include her after seeing her in “The Pitt”. Great show, and great episode
VixenXenn
Marcela Thomé
and, of course, Imgur’s own wife @Alsoashley - It’s been a while since I posted one, sorry to anyone who missed this. May my post bring you a little joy in these difficult times. @MadSovereignMary @dickblack12 @Shenaniganz80 @MermaidNinja @secretlyacd @deaddogsmuggler @JohnWickdidnothingwrong @Ngugi @OldBikerDude @Kevinbfree @applesugar @DaymanAhAAAAah @bdennis3222000 @SassySailor @500ug @villainousdescent let me know if you want to be added to the tags

item.title: Emratatatatata
item.dc:creator: limalimalimalimalima

item.title: Positive US news making the front page of my local paper in NZ...
item.description: How long it stays on the front page depends on whatever else happens today. But the article notes that there'll be no press release from the US Army about it because of Trumps edicts. So I thought I'd share it here. Source: https://www.stuff.co.nz/world-news/360654742/female-soldier-becomes-first-woman-compete-gruelling-us-army-ranger-contest
item.dc:creator: cmatmem8

item.title: I love this for them! To have someone notice you, without putting pressure on to be magically better but noticing the little things can mean everything!

item.title: Images of Note: Something went wrong
item.description:
We all need this today. Trans rights.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I am really trying to not let this break me
item.description: I know this ain’t really the right meme but the bear looks about like I do rn. Back story got a job at a landscaping company they had my 6’4” trans ass picking up sticks all day I got blisters on both my hands worked through a Charlie horse and back spasms and my pile of sticks at both places was 4x the size of the other ones but apparently “I can’t keep up”. Keep telling myself it’s just as much their loss as it is mine I am a super hard worker and all they had to do was give me a week two at most to adjust and I would have been the best worker they had. Thanks for listening. Have a blessed day. Edit thank you all I am trying to upvote all your kind comments you guys rock.
item.dc:creator: slightlybrokenegg

item.title: Repost because It’s Carpathia Day!
item.description: I almost missed it but thanks to tax day in the USA, I just remembered that today was the day when a group of heroes did their very best to save people’s lives. Note: I have some strong (and generally stupid) opinions on the Titanic BUT this post is about the helpers that Mr Roger’s talks about, not the Titanic.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: ‘A bunch of MAGA climate-deniers and Proud Boys neo-fascists are showing up to “protect Tesla”
item.description: ‘I’m not gonna lie. I don’t know what timeline we are in right now, but it’s a pretty funny one. A bunch of MAGA climate-deniers and Proud Boys neo-fascists are showing up to “protect” Tesla against left-leaning protestors who see Elon Musk as using Tesla to finance the rise of fascism in the US.” “There have been quite a few altercations with Trump supporters counter-protesting, but we are now starting to see full-fledged counter-protests by MAGA supporters and even far-right neo-fascist groups, like the Proud Boys.” https://electrek.co/2025/04/15/maga-tesla-store-gas-trucks-least-effective-counterprotest-ever/
item.dc:creator: DuraAce9sp

item.title: Lori Gibson, a sketch artist known for solving the most crimes in the 1970s. Her sketches led to the identification of over 1300 criminals.
item.dc:creator: HotPinkk

item.title: What Happened Today #75
item.description: The crackdown is here. Trump’s regime isn’t waiting for permission. They are punishing, blacklisting, and threatening anyone who resists. A whistleblower gets drone-stalked. A protester was tased to cheers at Marjorie Taylor Greene's town hall meeting on Tuesday night. The AP's victory was short-lived because all wire services got punished. And court orders? Still ignored. This isn’t politics. It’s authoritarian control in broad daylight. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/xinis-testimony 2. https://go.govbrief.today/caldwell-leak 3. https://go.govbrief.today/wireservice-pool 4. https://www.npr.org/2025/04/16/nx-s1-5366368/hong-kong-post-office-tariffs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/exempt-cleanair 6. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-threatened 7. https://go.govbrief.today/susman-order 8. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-shapely 9. https://go.govbrief.today/armyaf-libraries 10. https://go.govbrief.today/climate-funding 11. https://go.govbrief.today/labor-grants-dei 12. https://go.govbrief.today/rikers-ice 13. https://go.govbrief.today/justice-social-media 14. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-deferrals 15. https://go.govbrief.today/soda-candy-snap 16. https://go.govbrief.today/nlrb-whistleblower 17. https://go.govbrief.today/mtg-townhall
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
